request_payload.exposure_text: Remember the 2024 Midwest blackouts? Local officials were caught flat-footed because federal civil defense prep programs had been gutted. Our neighbors in Ohio are organizing local emergency response networks - why isn't our state doing the same? #CommunityPreparedness #NeverAgain
